arts.ttl: Amad Diallo has done something very impressive in almost half the time as Cole Palmer this season
arts.sum: Doubt Amad Diallo at your own peril 🔥

arts.ttl: Man Utd players 'deflated' at Dan Ashworth exit after Sir Jim Ratcliffe comments
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth will leave Old Trafford after chiefs at Manchester United ruthlessly decided to sack the highly-rated sporting director after just five months in the role

arts.ttl: Antonio Conte wants to sign Manchester United flop as Ruben Amorim given transfer 'green light'
arts.sum: Napoli could make a move for another Manchester United player in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: 10 Man Utd fans arrested in dawn raids for organised brawl with rival supporters
arts.sum: Manchester United drew 1-1 with Dutch side FC Twente in the Europa League in September in a game that was marred between violence between both sets of fans

arts.ttl: Danny Murphy names the ‘dominant’ Premier League team who could get the best out of Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Danny Murphy states which rival Premier League club would suit Marcus Rashford, should the attacker depart Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Could Sell 'World-Class' 26-Year-Old Alongside Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United could be tempted to sell defender Lisandro Martinez if Real Madrid step up their interest in the Argentinian in 2025.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The price Man United would consider Marcus Rashford offers for in January as they look to sell players to comply with PSR rules and provide funds for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY CHRIS WHEELER IN PLZEN: United are under pressure to sell players to comply with profit and sustainability rules, and raise funds for Amorim to strengthen his squad.

arts.ttl: Jason Wilcox will step into Dan Ashworth's role at Man United ahead of crucial January transfer window - as Red Devils weigh up potential executive appointment
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Jason Wilcox has stepped into Dan Ashworth's role at Manchester United going into the January transfer window following the club's shock decision to sack their sporting director.

arts.ttl: Man United players 'make feelings known' on Ruben Amorim's rotation policy
arts.sum: The majority of Manchester United's first-team squad are reportedly in favour of Ruben Amorim's rotational policy at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Team News: Viktoria Plzen vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Viktoria Plzen and Manchester United.
